name: Swiss Spaghetti Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Lightly grease a 4 x 8 baking pan with sesame oil.
3. Cut the spaghetti squash in half, remove the seeds and discard them. Place the squash cut side down into the baking pan with about one-third inch of water. Bake for 40 minutes.
4. Lower oven temperature to 375 degrees.
5. When the spaghetti squash is cool enough to handle, cut it into 1/2-inch cubes.
6. Steam Swiss chard for 6 minutes.
7. Combine all ingredients in a baking dish and bake for 15 minutes.
